2 days ago I had an interview for an MLOps role
One thing became very clear:
Documentation is everything

Skipping tutorials is fine
But if you truly want to grow:

• Read the docs 
• Learn concepts from books
• Build using tools like Claude
• Experiment yourself

What the hell is this?

An MLOps Engineer role with 4–6 years of experience offering only 4–9 LPA? Just look at the requirements below. 

Definitely such low packages are only for India. If you check their international positions, the salary is good.

AI Engineering vs. Agentic AI — Which career should you choose in 2026?

This breakdown compares the real skills, ratings, and hiring expectations for both roles so you can plan your learning roadmap with clarity.
